channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: ⚠️ Trump warns Iran 'clock is ticking' as peace talks stall
item.description: President Donald Trump issued his most direct warning to Iran yet, saying time is running out for negotiations as Tehran has not made concrete concessions.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President responds to Trump summit: 'We will not be sacrificed'
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te pushed back after Trump raised doubts about US arms sales and willingness to defend the island following his Beijing summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🏛️ Senate parliamentarian blocks $1 billion White House security funding
item.description: The Senate parliamentarian ruled that Republican efforts to allocate funding for Trump's proposed White House ballroom project cannot proceed through budget reconciliation.

item.title: 🏴 Political executions surge in Iran since war began, UN verifies at least 32
item.description: The United Nations has verified the execution of at least 32 political prisoners in Iran since the US-Israel war began on February 28.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine launches largest drone attack on Moscow in over a year, killing 4
item.description: Ukraine conducted one of its largest drone strikes of the war, killing at least 4 people near Moscow and wounding 12 others.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ IDF Extends Death Penalty Law to West Bank Palestinians Convicted of Terror
item.description: Israel Defense Forces Central Command chief has applied a new death penalty law to Palestinians in the West Bank convicted of terrorism, expanding capital punishment beyond Israel proper.

item.title: 🇦🇷✈️ Argentina Retires A-4 Fightinghawks After Six Decades
item.description: Argentina has finally stood down its A-4 Skyhawks, the type's first export operator, after 60 years of service as the country introduces its first F-16s.

item.title: 🇳🇴🇨🇳🕵️ Norway Arrests Chinese Man for Spying
item.description: Norway's interior security service has arrested a Chinese national on suspicion of espionage, marking another case of alleged Chinese intelligence activity in Europe.

item.title: 🦠 WHO Declares Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda Global Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization designated the Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern, with at least 80 deaths reported and no approved vaccines for this strain.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba Accuses US of Fabricating Drone Threat Claims
item.description: Cuban Foreign Minister Bruno Rodriguez dismissed US intelligence reports about Cuban drone acquisitions from Russia and Iran as a "fraudulent case" designed to justify sanctions and potential military intervention.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drone Attack Kills Four in Moscow's Biggest Strike in Over a Year
item.description: At least four people were killed after Ukraine launched its largest drone attack on Moscow in more than a year, demonstrating Kyiv's ability to strike targets over 300 miles from the border despite dense Russian air defenses.

item.title: 🇲🇩🇷🇺 Moldovan Leaders Decry Russian Move to Grant Citizenship in Separatist Region
item.description: Russia's decision to grant citizenship to residents of Transnistria has drawn condemnation from Moldovan officials who see it as an attempt to legitimize the breakaway region.

item.title: ⚽ Iran Omits Azmoun from Preliminary World Cup Squad
item.description: Iran left forward Sardar Azmoun out of its preliminary World Cup squad amid the ongoing war with the US and Israel.

item.title: ✈️ Two Navy Jets Collide During Air Show in Idaho, All Crew Eject Safely
item.description: Four crew members ejected safely after two Navy jets collided during an air show at Mountain Home Air Force Base in Idaho.

item.title: 💰 Bond Yield Spike Risk Catches Equity Markets Unprepared, Investors Warn
item.description: Investors are warning that equity markets are unprepared for the risks of a bond yield spike as central banks navigate inflation pressures.

item.title: 🇦🇪💥 Drone Strike Sparks Fire at UAE's Barakah Nuclear Power Plant
item.description: Abu Dhabi confirmed a drone strike caused a fire at the Barakah nuclear power plant perimeter, with authorities investigating the source and calling it a "dangerous escalation."

item.title: 🇮🇱📉 Israel GDP Shrinks 33% Annualized as Iran War Weighs
item.description: Israel's economy contracted sharply in the first quarter as the ongoing war with Iran took a heavy toll on economic activity.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 China to Buy at Least $17 Billion in US Agricultural Products Annually
item.description: The White House announced China has committed to purchasing at least $17 billion in US agricultural products annually as part of agreements from the Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: 📰 The Economist: Netanyahu Facing His Last Stand?
item.description: The Economist examines whether Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is facing his final chapter amid domestic pressure and war challenges.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Iran Faces Burden of Restoring Trust with Gulf States
item.description: A Gulf official told Al Arabiya that Iran bears the responsibility of rebuilding trust with Gulf Cooperation Council states amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel to Establish Defense Offices in Former UNRWA East Jerusalem Compound
item.description: Israel plans to establish defense offices in the former UNRWA compound in East Jerusalem, drawing criticism from Palestinian officials.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump-Backed Challenger Defeats Republican Senator Who Voted to Convict
item.description: Julia Letlow, backed by Trump, defeated incumbent Senator Bill Cassidy in Louisiana's Republican primary, marking retribution for Cassidy's impeachment vote against Trump.

item.title: ✈️ Four Crew Eject Safely After Navy Jets Collide During Idaho Air Show
item.description: Four crew members ejected safely after two Navy jets collided during an air show in Idaho, with no injuries reported on the ground.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US Intelligence: Cuba Seeking Russian Drones and Military Equipment
item.description: US intelligence reports indicate Cuba is seeking Russian drones and military equipment, raising concerns about Havana's alignment with Moscow and Tehran.
